name: yeeflow-app-builder
description: Yeeflow App Builder Codex plugin for building, validating, testing, and improving Yeeflow applications using Yeeflow-specific skills, including documented Yeeflow REST API capability mapping, browser OAuth API authentication, generated-final YAPK API-issued ID provenance hard gates, navigation runtime metadata hard gates, runtime-binding lessons guardrails for dashboard summaries and filters, approval real-control validation, navigation reachability checks, requester-context getUserAttr validation, app group ID and service portal payload guards, product-team YAPK schema refresh, Datetime canonical schema guardrails, app-plan conformance and navigation guardrails, product-team YAP/YAPK schema validation, Collection card-style and Collection + Grid table-style golden references, schema overlays, release safety scanning, package API automation, read-only workspace discovery and selection, and tenant-neutral environment configuration guidance.

interface.longDescription: Yeeflow App Builder Codex plugin for planning Yeeflow applications from requirements, generating and validating new .yap packages, learning from exported Yeeflow packages, inspecting and validating .yapk existing-application version packages, applying proven YAP/YAPK import-generation rules, documented Yeeflow REST API capability mapping, Browser OAuth-backed Yeeflow REST API authentication, Collection card-style and Collection + Grid table-style golden references, product-team canonical YAP/YAPK schemas with a separate Codex YAPK overlay, effective YAPK schema validation, generated-final YAP contracts, generated-final YAPK API-issued content ID provenance gates, generated-final YAPK navigation runtime metadata gates, dashboard grid-table Collection pattern gates, UI/Summary/KPI runtime hard gates, approval form designer-shape validation, workflow assignment assignee guardrails for manager-based and job-position routing, release safety scanning, ReplaceIds final coverage rules, workflow task URL page-type gates, advanced Yeeflow controls, reference-app UI templates, data-list system schema rules, read-only workspace discovery and selection, package materialization validation, app-plan-to-implementation conformance, navigation conformance guardrails, runtime-binding lessons for dashboard Summary/filter bindings, approval real-control validation, requester-context getUserAttr token wrappers, app group ID and service portal payload guards, signing/API proof boundaries, policy-as-data modeling, and official plugin release management. v0.6.36 adds UI runtime evidence developer-experience helpers: a synthetic/redacted docs/examples/runtime-evidence.redacted.example.json template shaped for scripts/inspect-runtime-evidence.mjs and scripts/inspect-visible-kpi-runtime-bindings.mjs, plus scripts/test-ui-hard-gates-all.mjs to run related UI hard-gate tests together. Dynamic visible KPI binding remains unresolved unless runtime-proven, future promotion requires a dedicated golden runtime package/evidence fixture, and UI/Summary/KPI hard-gate behavior is unchanged.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Yeeflow App Builder v0.6.36 to plan, generate, validate, and harden Yeeflow application packages. Before any Yeeflow API operation, check the REST API capability map, use only documented capabilities, check OAuth/API auth status, and if OAuth is missing or expired return plugin-login-flow guidance with auth_required / login_flow_required while preserving the original operation. Use read-only workspace and job-position discovery plus explicit target workspace confirmation for package install/import/upgrade. Require explicit confirmation for write capabilities, stronger confirmation for package install/import/upgrade/delete, and confirmed system-admin permission before job-position create/update/assign/remove writes. Treat schemas, package validators, workflow validators, assignment task assignee proof, runtime binding checks, API acceptance, plan-conformance checks, YAPK signing, generated-final YAPK ID provenance, generated-final YAPK navigation runtime metadata, YAPK upgrade ID stability, dashboard grid-table Collection validation, UI/Summary/KPI runtime evidence, aggregate UI hard-gate smoke, redacted runtime evidence templates, and approved app-plan hard gates as separate proof boundaries. Enforce standard app-plan structure, page-by-page UI implementation contracts before high-quality UI claims, sandbox-page proof for uncertain UI/runtime patterns, export-proven Yeeflow control/style shapes, designer-shaped hidden Summary configuration with real fields, filters, temp variables, save_var expression objects, and ReportIds, explicit fallback labels when KPI values are not runtime-proven, runtime screenshot/evidence before UI-quality claims, ListSetID/app identity/existing ID/lineage/declared-scope stability for UI upgrades, API-issued content ID provenance for generated-final .yapk, YAPK upgrade/new-version ID continuity for existing semantic resources, complete navigation runtime metadata, dashboard grid-table Collection wrapper/detail-link rules when planned, dashboard Summary/ext/ReportIds bindings, filter variable consumption, approval real controls, navigation reachability, requester-context getUserAttr token wrappers, app group ID suitability, service portal gating, signing/API proof boundaries, and policy-as-data modeling before calling a generated app ready.
